web.title: Ocean House Surfside | Luxury Oceanfront Condos in Miami
web.description: Discover Ocean House Surfside's luxury oceanfront condos between Miami Beach and Bal Harbour. Enjoy exclusive amenities and stunning views. Inquire today!
web.markdown:
![Ocean House Surfside logo.](https://oceanhouseresidences.com/wp-content/themes/oceanhouse/img/logo-b.png) **The Essence of Surfside** A rare collection of oceanfront residences amid the quiet and alluring sands of Surfside, Ocean House rises above the water, reflecting the brilliant light. Nestled between Miami Beach, Bal Harbour, and the Atlantic Ocean, this exclusive enclave starts with an essential location: one of the most desirable luxury residential waterfronts in Miami, with nearby access to every service and cultural amenity. The unsurpassed architecture by Bernardo Fort-Brescia offers views to the east, south, and west, taking in the sparkling ocean and Miami’s sculpted skyline. Each private residence is a uniquely customized home designed to evoke a restorative calm that extends throughout the entire property. Exquisite amenities are integrated into the lush tropical landscape, with reflecting ponds, floating cabanas, intimate lounges, and a spa and wellness center to enhance daily life with an uplifting sense of total well-being. - ![Exterior of Ocean House Surfside condominiums in Miami Beach, with balconies on each floor and beach in foreground.](https://oceanhouseresidences.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/10/slide1_1-scaled.jpg)Ocean Front View - ![Full floor terraces at Ocean House Surfside condos on Miami oceanfront, with beach sunset view in the background.](https://oceanhouseresidences.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/10/slide1_2-1-scaled.jpg)Golden Hour - ![Exterior of Ocean House luxury condos in Surfside, Miami at dusk, with ocean view in background.](https://oceanhouseresidences.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/10/slide1_3-1-scaled.jpg)At Dusk **Your Retreat Awaits** Behind the transparent façade, a limited collection of homes features elegant contemporary interiors by internationally renowned designer Carla Guilhem. She combines her expertise in luxury yachts and exclusive residences to create unparalleled bespoke design with impeccably crafted details. Through the use of just a few perfect organic materials, such as wood and natural stone, the residences feel idyllic and minimalist, never stark or austere. Indoor spaces transition effortlessly into the outdoors, underscoring the tropical nature of this serene oasis. Ocean House is the soul of discretion. Each home is accessed through private keyed elevators and vestibules, imparting a sense of arrival even before stepping through the grand front door. Once inside, the entryway is flooded with southern and eastern light, the sea and sand visible through the glass balcony. - ![Spacious living room at Ocean House luxury residences in Surfside, Miami, featuring terrace with couches and ocean view.](https://oceanhouseresidences.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/10/slide2_1-1-scaled.jpg)Living Room - ![Luxury oceanfront condo kitchen and dining room at Ocean House residences in Surfside, Miami, with expansive ocean views.](https://oceanhouseresidences.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/10/slide2_2-1-scaled.jpg)A kitchen at the Ocean House condo in Surfside. - ![Bedroom with king bed, floor-to-ceiling window, and balcony with ocean view. at Ocean House Surfside luxury condos in Miami.](https://oceanhouseresidences.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/10/slide2_3-1-scaled.jpg)Each unit is a bespoke sanctuary. PHOTO COURTESY OF BINYAN STUDIOS - ![Luxury bathroom with large elegant fixture, huge mirror and bath with open ocean views at Ocean House luxury condos in Miami.](https://oceanhouseresidences.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/10/slide2_4-1-scaled.jpg)Primary Bathroom **Penthouse** At the pinnacle of Ocean House, the elegant duplex Penthouse embodies the essence of this serene sanctuary. Spanning the full top floor and a private oceanfront rooftop, it offers uninterrupted views of sea, sky, and city. A rare expression of refined coastal living where privacy, light, and elegance exist in effortless harmony. EXPLORE ![](https://oceanhouseresidences.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/03/oceanHouse_Penthouse_home-scaled.webp) **Floor Plans** | Residence | Amenities | Specs | Floor Plan | | --- | --- | --- | --- | | Residence01 | - 4 Bedrooms
- 6 Bathrooms
- Powder Room
- Den / Suite | - Interior: 4,180 SF
- Exterior: 1,322 SF
- Total: 5,502 SF | [Download Floorplan](https://oceanhouseresidences.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/10/OceanHouse_Residence_01-1.pdf) | | Residence02 | - 2 Bedrooms
- 3 Bathrooms
- Den / Suite | - Interior: 2,093–2,134 SF
- Exterior: 404 SF
- Total: 2,497–2,538 SF | [Download Floorplan](https://oceanhouseresidences.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/10/OceanHouse_Residence_02-1.pdf) | | Residence03 | - 4 Bedrooms
- 4 Bathrooms
- Powder Room | - Interior: 2,633 SF
- Exterior: 1,095 SF
- Total: 3,728 SF | [Download Floorplan](https://oceanhouseresidences.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/10/OceanHouse_Residence_03-1.pdf) | | ResidenceSky West | - 4 Bedrooms
- 5 Bathrooms
- Powder Room | - Interior: 3,335 SF
- Exterior: 1,188 SF
- Total: 4,523 SF | [Download Floorplan](https://oceanhouseresidences.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/10/OceanHouse_Residence_SkyWest-1.pdf) | | ResidenceSky East | - 4 Bedrooms
- 7 Bathrooms
- Powder Room
- Family Room
- Den / Suite
- Staff Quarters | - Interior: 5,470 SF
- Exterior: 1,673 SF
- Total: 7,143 SF | [Download Floorplan](https://oceanhouseresidences.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/10/OceanHouse_Residence_SkyEast-1.pdf) | | ResidencePenthouse | - 6 Bedrooms\*
- 6 Bathrooms
- 2 Powder Rooms | - First Level
- Interior: 8,748 SF
- Exterior: 2,861 SF
- Total: 11,609 SF
- Second Level
- Interior: 728 SF
- Exterior: 2,190 SF
- Total: 2,918 SF | [Download Floorplan](https://oceanhouseresidences.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/03/OceanHouse_Penthouse_DigitalFloorplan_FINAL.pdf) | | | \*Secondary bedrooms can be converted into amenities suites as per book and renderings. | **Above & Beyond** The culture of sublime service at Ocean House continues with amenities exclusive to residents, including the intimate Club Room, a summer kitchen, and an experiential spa for which residents can book or bring their own custom treatments. Beyond lie twin reflecting ponds with private floating cabanas that serve as a liminal space between the building and the ocean. On the second level, beautifully landscaped outdoor space surrounds a vitality pool and a state-of-the-art fitness studio with a private training room. On the roof, the private pool is open to every side, with sunlight from dawn to dusk, in every season. A deck with panoramic views and an event space with cocktail lounge are ideal for residents to host private gatherings. Amenities at a Glance - ![Stunning swimming pool surrounded by greenery, an exclusive amenity at Ocean House luxury oceanfront condos in Miami.](https://oceanhouseresidences.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/10/slide3_1-1-scaled.jpg)Take a dip in the Vitality Pool PHOTO COURTESY OF BINYAN STUDIOS - ![Woman relaxing in swimming pool at Ocean Front Surfside condominiums in Miami.](https://oceanhouseresidences.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/10/slide3_2-1-scaled.jpg) - ![Large top floor outdoor pool deck on the oceanfront in Miami with ocean view at Ocean House luxury residences in Surfside.](https://oceanhouseresidences.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/10/slide3_3-1-scaled.jpg)Ocean House offers resort-style amenities such as a stunning rooftop pool - ![Treadmills in fitness center with view of the ocean and palm trees at Ocean Front Surfside luxury condos in Miami.](https://oceanhouseresidences.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/10/slide3_4-1-scaled.jpg)Fitness Studio **Surfside Beckons** Established in 1935, Surfside has long been known as the quintessential beach town for a small and discerning community. The ultimate luxury destination in Miami, it’s just steps from Bal Harbour with its world-class shopping, Four Seasons Hotel at The Surf Club, and the myriad dining possibilities on Harding Avenue. A short drive from both Miami International and Fort Lauderdale-Hollywood Airports, Surfside also has easy access to top-ranked schools and parks and recreation for every age. Those willing to travel just 10 miles quickly find themselves in the Miami Design District and Wynwood Arts District. Surfsiders inhabit a perfect paradox: a tropical getaway that happens to be just a stone’s throw from every desirable amenity and service. ![Map of Surfside around the new luxury oceanfront condominiums at Ocean House Surfside in Florida.](https://oceanhouseresidences.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/10/oceanhousemap-scaled.jpg) **The Team** VISIONARY / SALES & MARKETING Multiplan REAM Multiplan Real Estate Asset Management/s singular vision for inspired living was born from a rich 50-year history stretching across continents and culminating in South Florida, where the firm has distinguished itself as the preeminent developer of sustainability-driven, ultra-luxury real estate projects. Led by CEO Marcelo Kingston, seasoned real estate executive and entrepreneur with over 25 years of experience, the firm builds upon founder José Isaac Peres' long-standing history of excellence, with iconic projects that herald a new and prosperous era for the region. In the 1990s, Mr. Peres developed the luxurious Il Villaggio, and since then has completed two of the most luxurious boutique condos in Miami Beach: 57 Ocean and Ocean Park South Beach. Over the course of his career, Mr. Peres has established one of the most renowned and dominant real estate portfolios in Latin America. He is the founder and chairman of Multiplan Empreendimentos Imobiliários S.A., the largest publicly listed real estate company in Brazil, and has completed more than 35,000 residential condo units within over 350 projects in Brazil and South Florida. Multiplan REAM's overarching mission is to pay homage to the buildings' natural environments while enhancing the value of the surrounding communities. Energized by the unique cross-cultural synergy that continuously shapes and reshapes Miami-Dade County, this world-class development team and its distinguished partners continue to expand Mr. Peres' legacy throughout South Florida. ![Luxury condos in Miami Beach with ocean views at 57 Ocean by Multiplan REAM, developer of Ocean House Residences.](https://oceanhouseresidences.com/wp-content/themes/oceanhouse/img/team1.jpg)57 Ocean—Miami Beach![Il Villaggio condos in Miami Beach developed by Multiplan REAM, developer of Ocean House Surfside.](https://oceanhouseresidences.com/wp-content/themes/oceanhouse/img/team2.jpg)Il Villaggio—Miami Beach![Golden Green Condos gated community on the beach in Rio de Janeiro, Brazil by Multiplan REAM, developers of Ocean House.](https://oceanhouseresidences.com/wp-content/themes/oceanhouse/img/team3.jpg)Golden Green Condos Gated Community—Rio de Janeiro, Brazil ARCHITECTURE & LANDSCAPE DESIGN Arquitectonica / ArquitectonicaGEO Interiors Carla Guilhem Design Branding & advertising And Partners **News** - [Miami’s condo towers see sales soar beyond the once unbreakable $100M+ price barrier](https://nypost.com/2026/02/12/lifestyle/miamis-top-condos-see-sales-break-the-100m-price-barrier/) - [Ocean House Unveils $70 Million Penthouse in Surfside](https://resident.com/press-releases/2026/01/18/ocean-house-unveils-70-million-penthouse-in-surfside) - [Ocean idealiHouse Introduces $70 Million Penthouse at Surfside Oceanfront Development](https://www.miamilivingmagazine.com/post/ocean-house-70-million-penthouse-surfside) [View All News](https://oceanhouseresidences.com/news) **Thank You** We'll be in touch with you soon. **Contact Us** First Last EMail Phone City Residence Size2 Bedrooms3 Bedrooms4 Bedrooms 2 Bedrooms 3 Bedrooms 4 Bedrooms How did you hear about us?MediaMagazineEmail CampaignBrokerSite Signage Media Magazine Email Campaign Broker Site Signage Questions Are you a broker? ### Two to Five Bedroom Configurations

## The Residences

All Luxury condos in Ocean House include expansive balconies with wood-like ceiling accents, Atlantic Ocean, Bal Harbour, Miami Beach, and Downtown Miami views,10 ft. ceilings in all residences and up to 12 ft. in the Penthouse, clear glass terraces, finished residences with curated flooring, automated light control system, floor-to-ceiling impact-resistant sliding glass doors and windows, custom European kitchen cabinetry, Gaggenau kitchen appliances, European-style fixtures, Custom-designed Silestone island with waterfall edge and countertops, custom European bathroom cabinetry, Natural stone flooring, vanity with double sinks, glass-enclosed rainfall shower, freestanding tub, and more!

Click the photos for more details

SPECTACULAR COMMON AREAS

Luxury Amenities

Ocean House offers resort-style amenities, including a lushly landscaped arrival with covered porte cochère, elegant double-height lobby with custom stone reception desk, private elevators with dedicated lobbies, electronic fob-controlled access throughout, mail room with package-receiving services, garage with 24-hour valet service, electric vehicle charging stations, a rooftop pool, spa, fitness center, floating cabanas, intimate lounges and more!

### ABOUT THE AREA

## SURFSIDE

Real estate in Surfside offers a warm, inviting atmosphere while being just minutes away from the vibrant nightlife of Miami and South Beach. It’s no surprise that the demand for these properties is incredibly high, as residents enjoy luxurious amenities and modern conveniences, all while basking in the tropical climate. Whether for first-time buyers or seasoned investors, there are lucrative opportunities across a range of price points, though inventory remains limited.The city also boasts public tennis courts, swimming pools, and pristine beaches.Harding Avenue serves as the hub for fine dining establishments and trendy boutiques, with the famous Bal Harbour Shops located just a stone's throw away. The oceanfront Community Center, constructed in 1962, offers a variety of amenities such as a library, swimming pools, direct beach access, bars, and event spaces, open to the public every day of the week.

![](https://oceanhouse.miami/assets/images/image02.jpg?v=dabeb25b)

## THE LOCATION

Building Address:

[9317 Collins Ave, Surfside, FL 33154](https://maps.app.goo.gl/wgevVHrpnjRpsXhe7)

\- Brickell City Centre: 25 minutes’ drive\- Downtown: 25 minutes’ drive\- Wynwood: 20 minutes’ drive\- South Beach: 10 minutes’ drive\- Miami Airport: 25 minutes’ drive\- Bal Harbour Shops: 5 minutes’ drive

## floor plans of Ocean House

THE TEAM

DEVELOPER

Multiplan is a development firm founded by Brazilian Jose Issac Peres. It develops, owns and manages shopping malls in Brazil. At age 22 while an economics student, he founded his first real estate development company, named Vepan, which he turned into publicly-traded Multiplan. In 2014 Peres' Village Mall property in Rio de Janeiro became the site of Brazil's first official Apple store. Multiplan has also developed [57 Ocean](https://miamiresidential.com/57ocean/), Ocean Park and [Il Villaggio.](https://miamiresidential.com/ilvillaggio/)

![](https://oceanhouse.miami/assets/images/image11.jpg?v=dabeb25b)

![](https://oceanhouse.miami/assets/images/image14.jpg?v=dabeb25b)

## ARCHITECT

The architect of this revolutionary tower will be Arquitectonica, a firm highly recognized for being the creator of many buildings in Miami, such as [Aria Reserve](https://miamiresidential.com/ariareserve/), [Baccarat Residences](https://miamiresidential.com/baccaratresidences/), [Cipriani Residences](https://miamiresidential.com/ciprianiresidences), [Nomad Wynwood](https://miamiresidential.com/nomadwynwood), [St Regis Sunny Isles](https://miamiresidential.com/stregissunnyisles) and many more iconic buildings in South Florida.

INTERIOR DESIGNER

Carla Guilhem Design is an all-encompassing interior design firm that excels in crafting opulent and unforgettable environments tailored to embody the distinct personalities of each client. With over ten years of expertise in high-end residential, commercial, hospitality, and yachting projects, the firm has garnered a distinguished reputation for its commitment to innovation, eco-conscious practices, and teamwork.Guided by the leadership of founder and Principal Designer Carla Guilhem, the studio’s team of exceptionally skilled professionals hailing from diverse architectural and interior design backgrounds collaborates closely to seamlessly merge the client’s vision with Carla’s artistic sensibility. This ensures that each endeavor is not only aesthetically breathtaking but also meets practical requirements.

![](https://oceanhouse.miami/assets/images/image06.jpg?v=dabeb25b)

![](https://oceanhouse.miami/assets/images/image08.jpg?v=dabeb25b)

## Why invest in Miami

Investing in Miami offers numerous benefits, making it a prime real estate destination. Miami's strategic global location ensures robust economic growth and a thriving job market. The city attracts millions of tourists yearly, driving high demand for rental properties. Its real estate market boasts strong property appreciation and diverse investment opportunities. Miami offers a rich cultural scene, world-class dining, shopping, and entertainment, alongside beautiful beaches and a warm climate. The favorable tax climate, with no state income tax, further enhances its appeal. Excellent transportation infrastructure, including Miami International Airport and PortMiami, ensures seamless connectivity. With vibrant communities and continuous development, Miami promises immediate returns and long-term growth, making it an ideal investment choice.

## LATEST NEWS

Ocean House Miami now under construction!

In the heart of Surfside, Miami, a new, ultra-luxury oceanfront development is currently under construction and 33% sold, it's a great oceanfront condo opportunity.Updated on: 03/18/2025

Oral representation cannot be relied upon as correctly stating the representation of the developer. No federal agency has judged the merits or value if any of the property. This is not an offer to sell or solicitation to offer to buy, the condominium units in states where such offer or solicitation cannot be made. As Realtors we offer unbiased real estate representation to buyers and sellers. We offer individualized real estate services for you and not for the developer.
